chain.thought: Explanation: Reviewing the table, the "back of shirt sponsor" column is empty through 2008. Starting in 2009–2011, a back sponsor (PSU Technology Group) appears, and subsequent years also have back sponsors. Therefore, the last year without a back sponsor is 2008.
